name: WD_COURSE_PROGRESS_FINISH
description: Course completion screen with rotating content carousel. Shows course title and cycles through completion images, image sequences, and descriptions. Toggle period controls cycle speed. Theme-aware colors.
visualForm: Course title at top → rotating content slot (images/animations/text) cycling through completion assets
descriptionKo: 회전하는 콘텐츠 캐러셀이 있는 코스 완료 화면입니다. 코스 타이틀과 함께 완료 이미지, 이미지 시퀀스, 설명이 순환 표시되며 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
descriptionEn: Course completion screen with rotating content carousel. Shows course title and cycles through completion images, image sequences, and descriptions. Toggle period controls cycle speed. Theme-aware colors.
